name: Torte Au Chocola
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift dry ingredients together and set aside.
2. Combine the melted butter or oil, fruit sweetener, fudge sweetener, and vanilla in a bowl.
3. Add the egg yolks to the liquid mixture one at a time, blending well after each addition.
4. Gradually add the flour mixture alternately with the milk into the egg yolk mixture, stirring until just combined.
5. Whisk the egg whites in another clean bowl until stiff peaks form.
6. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the batter until thoroughly incorporated.
7. Grease and flour two 9-inch round baking tins.
8. Pour the batter evenly into the prepared tins.
9. Bake at 350°F for 30-40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. For a drier cake, bake until the cake pulls away from the edges of the pan.
10. Cool in the pans for 5 minutes before removing and transferring to wire racks to cool completely.
Filling:
1. In a bowl, blend together 8 ounces cream cheese, fruit sweetener, vanilla extract.
2. If needed, warm the mixture slightly to soften for blending.
Assembly:
1. Place the assembled filling into the cooled cake layers.
2. Frost with whipped cream sweetened with fruit sweetener and flavored with vanilla or your preferred flavoring.
3. Drizzle melted fruit sweetener around the edge of the cake.
4. Top with thinly sliced strawberries, if desired.
